title: Symmetry Salon
short_description: Style monster clients with perfect mirror lines — asymmetric haircuts make them sob into the salon mirror until it cracks.
description: Welcome to the Symmetry Salon, where fussy monster clients demand PERFECTLY balanced looks. Study each shape, letter and design: does it have a mirror line? How many lines of symmetry? Answer wrong and the client sobs dramatically into the salon mirror until it cracks — and no, they will not be paying. Grade bands ramp from spotting whether a mirror line exists, to counting lines of symmetry on friendly shapes, to sneaky cases like the parallelogram (zero — it fools everyone). A free online symmetry and geometry game for kids in grades 2–5, with speed and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the number of mirror lines before the client loses patience.
